notes: Cloud sync can now be encrypted with a passphrase. When set, your data is encrypted on this device with AES-256 before it's uploaded — GitHub, the sync server, and anyone with your sync slot ID only ever see scrambled data.
Set it under Cloud Sync → Encryption. Use the same passphrase on each device. Forgotten passphrases can't be recovered, so keep a local export as backup.
File export and import are unchanged and remain unencrypted.
